thinkpad_database.addons: Also as ThinkPad S2 Yoga Gen6 AMD

Display.multi_display: Supports up to 4 independent displays (native display and 3 external monitors via HDMI and USB-C)

memory.slots: Memory soldered to systemboard, no slots, dual-channel

display_options: 13.3" FHD (1920x1080) IPS multi-touch 300nits anti-reflection anti-smudge 72% NTSC
pen: ThinkPad Pen Pro, active pen for multi-touch display

storage.ssd_pcie: One M.2 2280 PCIe 3.0 x4 slot, supports up to 1TB SSD; also supports M.2 2242 SSD PCIe 3.0 x2

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter

Battary.tech: Integrated Li-Polymer, supports Rapid Charge (80% in 1hr) with 65W AC adapter

camera: Front HD 720p with privacy shutter, fixed focus
Front HD 720p + IR hybrid with privacy shutter, fixed focus
Front HD 720p with privacy shutter, fixed focus; rear 5.0MP autofocus
Front HD 720p + IR hybrid with privacy shutter, fixed focus; rear 5.0MP autofocus
audio: HD Audio, Realtek ALC3287 codec / stereo speakers, 2W x2, Dolby Audio Premium / dual-microphone array
keyboard: 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys with Unified Communications controls, LED backlight
TrackPoint pointing device and Mylar surface multi-touch touchpad
security: Touch style fingerprint reader on palm rest, match-on-chip
Optional IR camera for Windows Hello
BIOS security: Power-on password, Supervisor password, NVMe password, Self-healing BIOS
add_on_tips: Optional ENERGY STAR 8.0, EPEAT Gold, TCO Certified
